name: golang-github-leodido-go-urn-dev
title: golang-github-leodido-go-urn-dev
summary: Go parser for Uniform Resource Names
description:
Go parser for Uniform Resource Names
This parser deals with Uniform Resource Names as defined in RFC 2141
(URN Syntax). The actual parsing is accompanied by:
- fine-grained and informative erroring;
- namespace specific string normalization.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-leodido-go-urn-dev because Go parser for Uniform Resource Names.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-leodido-go-urn-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-leodido-go-urn-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-leodido-go-urn-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
